description_long: This shotgun features a modern, tactical design with a two-tone color scheme, combining tan and dark gray/black elements. The upper receiver and barrel shroud are tan, with venting slots along the barrel for heat dissipation and a rail system on top for mounting optics. The lower receiver and grip are dark gray, with the grip panels accented in brown or wood-like material. The magazine is box-shaped and protrudes vertically from the bottom, suggesting a detachable magazine system. The overall form is compact, with a short barrel and no visible stock, making it suitable for close-quarters use. The trigger guard is squared and robust, providing ample space for gloved fingers.
description: A compact, tactical shotgun with a tan upper and dark gray lower, featuring a vented barrel shroud, box magazine, and squared trigger guard. The design is modern and optimized for urban close-quarters scenarios.
description_view_0: Side view showing the tan upper receiver, vented barrel shroud, dark grip, and box magazine.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel opening, muzzle, and the alignment of the upper and lower receiver.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the dark lower receiver, brown grip panel, and the full length of the vented barrel shroud.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the grip, magazine, and the squared rear of the upper receiver.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with vented shroud and top rail
attribute_trigger_guard_design: squared, robust, medium-sized with no finger grooves
